name: Joel Isaacson & Co.
description_short: Fee-only fiduciary wealth management and financial planning firm with $8B+ AUM, serving 1000+ clients across asset management, tax planning, and comprehensive financial advisory since 1993.
description_long:
Joel Isaacson & Co. is a fee-only, fiduciary financial planning and wealth management firm founded in 1993 by Joel Isaacson, who pioneered objective, commission-free financial guidance at a time when such advice was uncommon. Over 30 years, the firm has grown to manage over $8 billion in assets under management with a team of 50+ experienced professionals serving 1,000+ clients. The firm operates as a registered investment advisor (RIA) and emphasizes transparency, personalized service, and long-term client relationships rather than transactional financial products.

The firm offers comprehensive wealth management services spanning asset management, tax and financial planning, estate planning, corporate benefit coordination, and budgeting. Their service approach is designed to scale with clients' changing life circumstances and financial complexity. They provide ongoing advisory relationships rather than one-time planning engagements, positioning themselves as collaborative partners in clients' financial decision-making.

What distinguishes Joel Isaacson & Co. is their explicit fiduciary commitment, fee-only business model (no commissions on product sales), and emphasis on personalized service beyond standard checklists. The firm has received significant third-party recognition, including AdvisorHub's "100 RIAs to Watch" (2023-2025) and Barron's "Top 100 RIA Firms" (2020-2025). Leadership includes credentialed professionals with CPA, CFP®, PFS, JD, and MBA designations. Their philosophy centers on putting clients "in the front seat" of their financial lives with dedicated guidance.

A key caveat is that this firm's minimum asset requirements and service model are designed for affluent clients with complex financial situations—those with substantial assets to manage, significant tax concerns, or complex estate planning needs. The firm does not appear to serve budget-conscious consumers seeking basic credit repair, debt relief, or emergency lending. Their $8B+ AUM and 1,000-client base suggest average client relationships are substantial, likely excluding those seeking entry-level financial services or credit remediation.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Fee-only, commission-free fiduciary model eliminates conflicts of interest in product recommendations
$8B+ assets under management demonstrates significant scale and institutional credibility
50+ experienced professionals with multiple CFP®, CPA, and specialized credentials on staff
30-year track record since 1993 provides long-term operational stability and expertise
Recognized by leading financial publications including Barron's Top 100 RIAs and AdvisorHub's 100 RIAs to Watch
Comprehensive service suite covering asset management, tax planning, estate planning, and benefit coordination
Explicit fiduciary commitment and transparent business model documented on website
cons: No pricing or minimum account size information disclosed; likely requires substantial assets to qualify as a client
Not positioned for consumers seeking credit repair, debt relief, or emergency financial assistance
Limited digital tools or online self-service options mentioned; appears to rely on traditional advisory relationships
No geographic service area clearly defined; unclear if they serve all states or have location restrictions
Miscategorized in 'fix-my-credit' category when firm actually serves high-net-worth wealth management clients
best_for: High-net-worth individuals and families with $1M+ in investable assets seeking comprehensive wealth management
Business owners and executives requiring integrated tax planning, benefit coordination, and estate planning
Clients prioritizing fiduciary relationships and transparent fee-only advisory over commission-based product sales
Affluent families with complex financial situations needing multi-generational planning and asset management
diagnosis: Joel Isaacson & Co. is a high-end, fee-only wealth management firm designed for affluent clients with substantial assets, complex tax situations, and multi-generational planning needs—not for consumers seeking credit repair, debt relief, or emergency lending. The firm's $8B+ AUM, 30-year track record, and fiduciary commitment make it credible for serious wealth building, but it is entirely unsuitable for the credit-focused services in its current CreditDoc category.
services: Tax planning and tax optimization strategies
Wealth management and ongoing advisory relationships
Personalized financial guidance and strategy development
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
